key_concepts: Instead of smoothing out raw measurements, we can cap them or group them into categories.
Clipping manually caps extreme values safely at a specified minimum/maximum boundary.
Binning (discretization) converts numerical features into categorical ranges. It intentionally destroys fine-grained linear correlation to allow simple models to capture non-linear steps.

definitions.definition: Memotong nilai data pada batas absolut minimum atau maksimum yang ditentukan.
Mengubah data numerik kontinu menjadi kelompok-kelompok diskrit berdasarkan batas rentang (interval).

examples: Converting 'Age' into categorical bins like 'Teenager', 'Adult', 'Senior' (binning) so linear models understand thresholds.
